prohibited_items: Professional cameras with detachable lenses (lens > 6 inches)
Outside food and beverages (sealed water bottles under 500ml may be allowed)
allowed_items: Sealed empty water bottles (to fill inside)
Seat cushions (no larger than 15x15 inches, no zippers/pockets)
screening_process: All fans must pass through security screening at the gate entrance. This includes walk-through metal detectors and bag inspection. Clear bag policy is strictly enforced. Expect 8-15 minutes wait time depending on the gate.
prohibited_behavior: Standing in aisles or blocking exits
Use of discriminatory language or behavior

security_contacts.suspicious_activity: Report to nearest security personnel or text 'ALERT' to 78247

tips: Use clear bags to speed up security screening
Arrive 90+ minutes early — security lines are longest 60-30 minutes before kickoff
Leave prohibited items in your car or at home
Security staff can provide temporary storage for small items at some gates
